records.diff:
--- sort_numbers_v0
+++ sort_numbers_v1
@@ -1 +1,10 @@
-# Source unavailable for sort_numbers
+def sort_numbers(params: dict) -> str:
+    """Sort numbers using optimized Timsort. O(n log n)."""
+    try:
+        numbers = params.get("numbers", [])
+        if not numbers:
+            return "[]"
+        result = sorted(numbers)
+        return str(result)
+    except (TypeError, ValueError):
+        return "[]"
